After careful consideration of your qualifications and our strategic direction for the Platform Engineering team, we've determined that this particular opportunity may not be the best fit for your development at this stage.

We sincerely appreciate the time you've invested in preparing your application and hope that this decision doesn't reflect poorly on your capabilities. We remain confident that your skills will find appropriate application elsewhere where they will be fully valued.

We wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Sincerely,
Yuki Tanaka
Hiring Manager
reasoning: 'Please accept our deepest apologies' and 'hope that this decision doesn't reflect poorly' show explicit contrition and regret.
